review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: They lure people with high package.
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2: I can't begin to tell you the atrocities I had to go through in the Marketing team. - I was the happiest to join a bank like this, until the reality hit hard. - I was struggling to get a laptop in my first 2 weeks, had to seriously escalate to make the annoyance known to my boss to get attention. - Unnecessary salary account opening is done here. Unorganized IT and HR, the first few weeks were hell, as I had no clue what I am doing. It gets on your nerves. - No proper KRA is given. I had to ask my boss several times "what is my job!!!" and still wasn't given a proper handover. - You will be asked to perform in the first few weeks, imagine with no proper guidance at all ... - Micromanaging bosses, difficult bosses to work with. To an extent my boss used to leave the calls abruptly, shout on utterly nonsense things, a lot of partialism was faced. Outright BAD behavior. Bad is an understatement. They will count your weaknesses, they will make sure you are made to feel under confident. They will ensure you are overwhelmed until things get out of hand. They will get to personal stuff, question your sensitive nature. The boss used to question my skills every now and then ,leaving me perplexed. Boss will tell u don't laugh, don't do this, don't do that. Boss will tell you what is this prolonged illness that you have when you say you need to work from home...and shout for being a normal person. People who would like to have their own space, cannot build themselves here as the boss is constantly sitting on their heads. Boot licking and oldest employees will be appreciated. You will be made to work 10-12 hours a day. -Marketers here spend their time taking unnecessary approvals from product heads, L&C and marketing heads. imagine the back and forth during urgent campaigns until you go nuts and get panic attacks. There is no place for hardworking and creative people who want to do meaningful work. - There is nothing to learn in the team. No purpose, unmindful approach for everything. They're doing basic emailers stuff in the name of marketing. You can't even think broadly or create a vision for the products that you handle. Agencies you need to coordinate will give u a hard time, coz they're already working for multiple teams. You won't talk data, you won't talk analysis, you won't talk digital...everything is so bureaucratic, that you will get lost in the approval stage. - Bad culture and atmosphere. unhelpful staff and colleagues. You are not respected for your experience. - The senior management - all marketing VPs are worst with no proper merit at all. - My notice period was made hell coz the boss would randomly wake up from slumber on the weekends too to assign a task. - A place I used to get bad vibes always. A place where I knew I couldn't stay. I still feel the trauma and I am not yet over the fact with what had happened. How can a reputed bank like this have the worst culture ever. Glad m out of it. Please join if you love to work under pressure, love undermining bosses, love to get paychecks at the cost of your respect. Not a place for good people.

I was a Branch Manager in Delhi for 14 months (worst period in my professional career so far). Every word below is true and heart felt.

SM- Senior Management

1. Use of foul language is rampant, without any checks and controls. Senior Management uses it themselves and hence it percolates till bottom.

2. Insensitive to the staff, especially to the new joiners.

3. Lack of professionalism and hand-holding; SM wants results to be delivered, but they are not interested in helping you resolve the hurdles which may be blocking your results.

4. No job security; constant threats to be fired from the job. or place you on PIP.

5. Poor internal processes; bad HR, strong SM which is unfriendly.

6. SM skills are not at par with the industry; I had worked with ICICI Bank for 6 yrs before joining Kotak, and I know many people in HDFC; I know what I am talking about.

7. Some Zonal Managers blindly believe their one downs; who conveniently maneuver them basis their will; which may go against you if these one-downs don't like you.

8. Poor empathy with staff and their requirements; SM does not care about it.

There are more cons than pros fo Kotak Mahindra Bank. If you work professionally and need a good working culture " DO NOT GO TO KOTAK BANK"

> Pathetic policy framework, New policies are made and announced backdated.e.g some policy amendment is done on 10 Jan, it is supposed to be applicable from 1st Jan
> Contests launch backdated which result to failure in the contest
> Unqual distribution of business 
> Politics, humiliation and cleverness of the management
> They always try not to pay to the employees various times
> No customer orientation
> No employee friendliness 
> Work-life balance is completely imbalanced; long working hours has become a culture
> Over-stretched and over-pressure work
> Sales targets are not designed properly. Too much to ask in this compensation.
> No employee benefits as compared to other banks. 
> No set guidelines; very baseless policies and decisions are made on the discretion of the employee (not on the basis of facts and figures and common sense)

It is a really frustrated organization.

This was a shocker for me and my probation got extended just because I was not able to get the right students for the course. The meetings with the higher management are highly toxic in which they dont listen,will cut you off and try to put you down for everything that is happening. This really drained my energy and made me to think of better opportunities elsewhere. Whoever is planning to join them,please understand that no matter how efficient and smart you are as a facilitator,unless and until you get the required numbers,it is not enough.

Extremely autocratic ! They ll always tell you that you are working for the CEO. The bank overall lacks professionalism. No work life balance. They will make you slog on all saturdays (despite saturdays being holidays for corporate roles) and holidays. 

They have handled the ING- Kotak merger in a pathetic way! Made false promises to ING employees prior to merger (like you are a patt of Kotak family, you dont have to relocate to Mumbai etc). All promises were simply forgotten after 2nd April. They dont treat employees like human. 

The Bank does not have pre-defined work processes. The processes change as per the mood of seniors and CEO's chamchas. 

Favourism prevails. HR should be called Recruiters coz they dont perform any employee welfare functions.

Payscale is poor. I am surprised how Kotak managed to get best employer Awards a few years back. 

All in all pathetic culture with no professionalism / career growth.

review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2:
1) As a dealer in securites , the main task is to service clients & Generate business for the company , i am doing in retail kotak securities , so when you start with this job there will be so many hurdles , as the clients will be retailers the dealers should give the good recommendations if not the business cannot be generated, The dealer should not give their own recommendations, The equity research team should give the recommendations, I have a experience of 1 year 4 months in kotak.

As a dealer you should mainly concentrate on short term recommendation's like Intraday , BTST ( Buy today sell tomorrow ) Calls , when i worked the first 6 months are very hard , as the short recommendations given by the back office are very poor , if the client looses money it is very hard to generate business in this industry, if the calls are failed, as the clinets are retailers , there will be so much issues.

2) The manger which i am working under will force to generate atleast 1-4 crores of business transactions , as the clients are retailers it is hard to do business daily 4 crores & There will be also some HNI accounts , but if heavily traded based on kotak research recommendations the client will lose money, if client looses money the client will stop doing business. so it is impossible to trade with HNI clients , there will be only 20 - 30 hni clients, the manager will force to do the business , first they should see weather the clients are getting profits or not.

3) Without experience, if you enter into this business , it will take atleast takes 2-4 years to understand stock markets , strategies. it is hard to make clients , if you make good clients in the period of 6 months you can survive & If the seniors keep resignation and your rapo is good with them you can take their client data base also, but in kotak it is reverse , the manager will decide wether to give the data or not , the person who is doing hard work cant saw by the manger , the person who is doing good business will get the clients i.e the seniors will get the data , then what about the freshers , they should die ?

4) Giving respect to employees & speaking nicely , influencing the team member , motivating the team member is important , the main in kotak is the mangers will shout and demotivate the employees , because of this so many employees has resigned in kotak securities & Left the company .

6) The last one the salary hike is very poor .

In sort every sales manager  have to adopt kotak as a adopted child and had to spend more than 60 % of there salary for that with different reasons.
6. Kotak is provided lots of incentive but only 5% of employees are able to earn because of so many terms and conditions which are not able to achieve. So these incentive are only to show.

9. As per the kotak you always get off on most of the Saturday but every employee force to work on every sat sun and every festival and before and after office hours.
In short employees are 24 hours and 365day slaves but on record they provide  all facilities.

review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9:
Good Working Environment.

review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2:
Its a Long List along with explanation, Here Goes:

1) We have been allotted 28 Paid Leaves/Casual Leaves out of which only 8 Leaves can be carried forward and still we are allowed to take a Maximum Paid Leave of 10-12 days that too because of the HR Mandatory PL Policy.

2) Managers think that a person cannot be Sick on Friday and can come to office on Saturday (It means the person is Lying) ... Any XYZ Degree Doctor's Certificate is not Valid... It is Mandatory that you have to get a Certificate from MBBS (They feel, MBBS Doctors cannot produce False Certificates)

3) Very Poor Infrasturcture:
If you want to go to the Pee  and Fill your Water Bottle in one single Break, it will take you atleast 5-8 minutes entirely to do both the things, because the of the Location of the Water Cooler & Washrooms. (The Total Break that you get in a day apart from Lunch Break is only 25 Mins) . It means you can do this procedure only 3 times in a day. 

4) If you Gone through Injury like Fracture or any XYZ Illness due to which you cannot report to work, maximum you will get 12 (Paid Leaves + Sick Leaves) adjusted against the same. Rest all will be Loss of Pay (Irrespective weather you have 30 Paid Leaves as Balance for yourself.). And the worst part over here is even the HR does not help, then please remove the HR and name them as Recruiters only. No Human Resourse.

5) Incentive Structure:
If you want to earn incentive in a particular Month, you cannot fall Sick in that month. If you fall sick by mistake and dont report for one day, 50% of your Incentive is Deducted (No Exceptions)

6) Appraisals:
Very Low rate of Appraisals. Even a person with Maximum rating i.e. P5 gets appraisal of Maximum 12%. Apart from that Appraisals are entirely Partiality Based,
The only Mantra to get nice appraisals : Have a good Repo with the TL & Manager.
Live Example:
A = Person who did all the hard work possible and got his Appraisal Score till 80%.
B = Person who did full on Masti, Late Comings, No Sincerity in work and his Appraisal Score was 32%.

Appraisal Rating of A = Appraisal Rating of B
A got hike of Rs. 15000
B got hike of Rs. 20000

That is what they call Transparent Appraisal ratings. :))

Apart from this, Appraisals were done almost after the Merger was done. On the Merger, the Company issues 100% Bonus Shares to all the Share Holders which definitely means a huge Profit to the company. But looking at the Appraisals, it seems that Company is running in Losses only.

7) We have 3 Centres: Mumbai, Delhi & Chennai:
When there are Election/Annual Function/Maintenance Activity/XYZ issue in Delhi, Delhi Centre is Closed for the Entire Day.
When there is similar kind of issue in Mumbai, Mumbai is shut for Half Day and Boys come in Evening for Logging in (Half Day) and along with thay they need to cover the remaining half day afterwards in the coming days.

8) Managers expect Quality calls from Officer, but cannot control the quality of the Backend Operations Department who do the goof up while performing their activities. It is us who face the rage of the dissappointed customers.

9) No Space for Innovation. You think of something new, inform the managers, they say " We'll share this ahead and then you get no further response.

You raise a complaint against XYZ department as per the customer (Tujhe pata toh hai kaise hota hai ye sab... Jaake bol de sir Feedback Le Leta hu) and then you go back to the customer to listen to abuses which he is obviously not giving to you but to the company.

10) No Exceptions made even if you get an opportunity in another department where you are interested in. You have 2 options, either ask for department change only after 2 years OR the 2nd and the Best Option: Put down your Resignation Letter and they will automatically offer you another department.

Many Cons to list but short of time.

review-details_detailsLink__NxIv5: The master of using middle class people for their own income in the name of giving a career
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: There is no reason one should work for such a pathetic company. Skip to the cons...
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2:
I have been working with Kotak Life for almost 4 months now and here are some things that some might consider even borderline illegal while considering to work here:
1) THEY LIE TO RECRUIT PEOPLE. Yes. They tell you a lot of things sch as it is a leadership position that they are offering and not a typical Insurance selling position. As you are slowly integrated into the work culture, you get to know that it is sort of a cult that they are heading where they slowly try to inculcate that they are doing the "financial planning" of people by selling policies and it is mandatory for everyone who joins to get a minimum number of policies done by their family members or contacts to get their offer letter irrespective of their financial status. In fact, they are put under pressure to get it done.
2) They might sell it as a leadership position but the fact is that you recruit people by tele-calling and getting your friends searching for a job and then continuing the cycle of using people for money.
3) I remember the company selling a policy to a young person with no income and forcing him to buy a policy in his father's name who used to earn 10,000 permonth. The policy amount? 27,000.
4) Heights of unprofessionalism as managers here openly practice copying signatures of clients on some forms. Yes, you read that right. Im not sure about the exact details of the law but im pretty sure forgery of a signature is a crime.
5) In plain and simple words, the business model followed by Kotak Life is a scam of massive proportions being operated under a legal umbrella using the high unemployment rate in our country as a lure to make profit on their business and using hapless young individuals in the name of providing a career...

review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: Everyone is approachable, which tend to instill confidence for getting the answers quickly, but usually we get 'NO" as an answer, at least there is no gestation period for it.
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2: I came to join KOTAK from a much larger private sector bank and found that I committed the gravest mistake of my life. I worked with my previous organization for more that 6years and its been already 2yrs working here, but I have not been able to adjust to the culture that prevails in this organization. Middle/ Senior Management is output driven and exert only pressure on staff to sell bank products, their apathy towards their staff concerns and issues does not excite them when they launch contests. They will make you work extra hours and call you on Sundays to showcase how committed they are, and they forget about your personal space, your peace of mind, and dissatisfaction it generates. I have seen it becoming counter productive as the staff that comes on Sunday never really works and they tend take out time during the weekday to compensate for time lost on Sunday/ Holiday.

review-details_detailsLink__NxIv5: You may loose your job any day, unsafe environment for new employees, full of egoist and abusive supervisors...
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9: Good and safe culture for old employees in the system.
review-details_isCollapsed__Bsg_9 2:
There are two different cultures existing in the bank. One is of people having long seasoning and another is for new. Regardless of fact that how much you are qualified and experienced, these old supervisors will treat you as freshers. Even sometimes a seasoned grade junior could create problem for new people. Definition of new continues for at least 3 years but there are few who survives for these many years.
Daily so many times you will get threatened for job in very abusive and insulting manner. Taunting and dejection will be part of your life. Any day your boss or super boss will ask you to leave. If you have any innovative idea or you are expressive, for sure your supervisor will thrash you upto a level from where you will forget even your glorious past in previous organisations. Memos and counselling mails are frequent here. You can not start even a single day with motivation. If you will call your HR manager for help then there are 99% possibilities of finding your boss sitting with the HR personal and the entire discussion will get converted as a counselling meet for your improvement. You will feel the heat for many days and referred by them on occasions.  If you are a Branch Manager and for some financial benefits if you join here then you even can't count the treatment ways. You have to work as sales officer. Your budget or annual targets are nothing. Even if you are achieving all, your boss could ask you to leave the job without any reasons. Noone will come forward to help you. They will ditch you showing you a way to bigger branch but when you join you find a newly opened branch with very few untrained team. From the day one you will start listening bad words and threatening. "A REAL graveyard of Talents".
Cheap behaviour is common among senior people who are old in the system. They have high egos. They behave as owner of bank and push you all the times very hard. Not a single motivation. Health will go for a toss. "Shrinking mind with sinking heart is routine."

-Unprofessional Managers.
-Zero Work Life Balance.
-No Perks for Overtime.
-Overtime seems to be a Norm.
-Cheap mentality.
-Transportation, location is difficult and not easily accessible.



Kotak as an Indian company, I'll support due to Make In India Initiative.
However, by no means it deserves a 3.4 Rating. if Glassdoor allowed us to give negative ratings, it definitely would have gotten it. 3.4 Rating seems fishy though. work life balance is very bad, your manager would perfectly come with additional work just before 10 15 minutes of the closing time, matter is always urgent and needs to be resolved by the same day. which would ruin your evening plans EVERYTIME. I never saw a sunset for entire time I spent in Kotak. even after having a regular day shift which Ideally should end at 5pm. Job Role mentioned in JD never matches with actual work, I was hired for Analytics & reporting, however I also had to sent couriers for Kotak Agents :P I never done paperwork in years, when first time Manager asked me to do it, I thought he was kidding.

I had requested a Leave for at least 3 months prior to my vacation. still I had to beg for a leave everyday as manager didnt approve it. I had to change my plans and also my groups vacation twice, even after that he didnt approved it. He asked me to put down my papers as I gone ahead and took the vacation :P:P that was the best decision I made !! its better not to work with such organization where your value is NOT determined by your skills & Performance.


p.s. if you have resigned and need your form 16, or pf related forms, be very careful about it and escalate it if you didn't get it in few months after your resignation. they say that they upload it on portal but that system is faulty.

later if you approach for the same KOTAK WILL ASK FOR Money to provide the documents and give you a reason that they have to collate it from 3rd party vendor. ITS A SCAM !! They internally manage it. if asked for money, make sure to highlight the same to higher management. it would not do any good and since you would be in hurry you will end up paying money like I did.
